subject: A blindfolded sphinx-like figure haloed by a great golden ring inscribed with glowing arcane glyphs
description: A serene humanoid figure with blue-violet skin sits centered against a vast golden disc or halo inscribed with luminous arcane script. The figure wears a white cloth blindfold across the eyes and a high collar; the hands are raised in a gesture of meditation or invocation. The radiant ring of glyphs dominates the composition, casting a divine, oracular light. The background is a deep blue void streaked with motion blur radiating outward from the ring, reinforcing the sense of cosmic insight and revelation. The palette is a striking pairing of saturated cobalt blues and burnished gold.
foreground: blindfolded blue-skinned figure with raised hands, framed by a glowing golden ring of glyphs
background: deep blue void with radial motion lines emanating from the central halo
